name: Taz'Rah
description: The domanaar's prized champion, Taz'Rah, is forced to fight against his will. Taz'Rah demands his own death from every opponent, hoping each battle will finally end his suffering.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text:
Taz'Rah uses [Gather Shadows] to summon Ethereal Shades that perform [Nether Dash], damaging targets in a line in front of them.

While Taz'rah's [Dark Rift] is active, players are drawn towards it.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;The effect from [Dark Rift] pulls in all players toward it and inflicts very high damage to those who fall into its center.

$bullet;Taz'Rah uses [Gather Shadows] to summon Ethereal Shades that perform [Nether Dash], damaging targets in a line in front of them.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Nether Dash] strikes all players in a line and inflicts Shadow damage over a long duration.

$bullet;The effect from [Dark Rift] pulls all nearby enemy targets toward it and inflicts very high damage to any who get pulled into it.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet;[Cosmic Spike] inflicts heavy Shadowstrike damage.

$bullet;The effect from [Dark Rift] pulls in all players toward it and inflicts very high damage to those who fall into its center.
